sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68313" key="mokkw/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοκκώνωσις</orth> (sic)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">· περιφρονεῖς</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1227.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Blaes.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μακκοάω</foreign>.</entryFree>
